title: Current Story
author: Zain Dana Harper
statement: Seventeen images, shown in the order they were made. They tell my current story.
source_note: Original PNG files were supplied by the author. The public WebP composite preserves the sequence and aspect ratio; the generation method is not asserted in this manifest.

images.alt: A fractured monochrome figure crouches in a dark geometric interior while two small figures stand beyond a bright keyhole-shaped opening.
A faceted violet-gray figure in the left foreground looks toward a luminous doorway containing a distant silhouette.
Two dark fragmented figures lean together in a wet, ruined interior, with a small open doorway at the far right.
A seated angular figure covers their face in shadow while two small figures appear beyond a bright keyhole opening.
A black-and-white fragmented standing figure covers their face against a cracked, dripping wall.
A black-and-white angular figure bends forward in a corridor while a distant silhouette stands in a bright doorway.
A fractured black-and-white figure leans forward with a hand over their face as shadowed forms repeat behind them.
A red, charcoal, and violet fractured portrait rests its head in one hand against a dark geometric field.
Two small dark figures stand close together beside a narrow door in a pale, fog-filled expanse.
A lone curled figure sits near the bottom center of a vast pale field.
One figure stands in the foreground of a pale gray expanse while another waits far away in a bright doorway.
A crouched figure occupies the dark foreground beneath a giant keyhole opening where two figures stand in light.
A luminous empty room contains a worn chair, a narrow doorway at left, and an open horizon at right.
A freestanding slab with a keyhole opening stands in a pale landscape, with a small crouched figure beside it and another opening in the distance.
A tiny doorway and a nearly invisible figure sit on the horizon of a vast luminous plain.
A single tiny figure stands near the horizon beneath an immense blue-white field of light.
A pale cube floats above a misty sea and a low distant island under diffuse light.
